title: Pretty Hitboxes-Create Addition
body:
# Pretty Hitbox-Create Addition
This project is based on [pretty hitboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/pretty-hitboxes)    
Functions are mostly the same, the only difference is that this mod added an option to turn off hitbox rendering Create Mod entities.
![functions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46e3d0397eec9cf04cca8fb6c99476f199394369.png)
